TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Kawbu’, title = Kawbu’, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kawbu’} }

S.FORM: alang Kawbu' ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 31 buwan, 110 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 85% kyan ku 93 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 15% kyan ku 17 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 76%, Amis 6%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran. tay 'llaw na Kawbu' hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Kawbu' hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Kawbu' hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Kawbu' hya' ga rgyax krahu'. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Kawbu' hya' ga Rangay. tay mkyahu' na Kawbu' hya' ga Khpan.

alang Kawbu' ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 31 buwan, 110 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 85% kyan ku 93 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 15% kyan ku 17 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 76%, Amis 6%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran. tay 'llaw na Kawbu' hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Kawbu' hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Kawbu' hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Kawbu' hya' ga rgyax krahu'. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Kawbu' hya' ga Rangay. tay mkyahu' na Kawbu' hya' ga Khpan.
S.PHON: alaŋ kawβuʔ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku toweŋ s~ɕi atu ħos~ɕiŋ ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. taj ʔllaw na kawβuʔ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na kawβuʔ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na kawβuʔ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na kawβuʔ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na kawβuʔ ħjaʔ ɣa raŋaj. taj mkjaħuʔ na kawβuʔ ħjaʔ ɣa kħpan.
